title: Aussie Keto Beef Burger
description: A low-carb twist on a classic Aussie burger, featuring a high-protein beef patty served with roasted vegetables.

ingredients.name: Roasted vegetables (such as lettuce, tomato, onion)

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Form the Australian beef into 4 equal-sized patties.
Season the patties with burger seasoning.
Grill the patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 135°F (57°C) for medium-rare.
Meanwhile, toast the rustic bread slices.
Assemble the burgers by spreading mayonnaise or keto-friendly spread on the toasted bread, followed by a beef patty, roasted vegetables, and cheese.
